description: Verify brand compliance of Adobe Illustrator file: fonts, colors, and logo/brand presence.
prompt_instructions: Scan the document text extracted from an Adobe Illustrator (.ai) file.
Check if the fonts used match standard brand font families (e.g., Helvetica, Arial, Futura, or any brand-specific fonts mentioned in the document).
Look for brand color references in Pantone, hex (#RRGGBB), or CMYK format.
Detect the presence of a logo or brand name in the document content.

Format the output as JSON: { "fonts_found": ["Font1", "Font2"], "brand_fonts_compliant": <true/false>, "colors_found": ["Color1", "Color2"], "color_format": "<Pantone/Hex/CMYK/Mixed/None>", "logo_or_brand_detected": <true/false>, "brand_name": "<name or null>", "status": "<Compliant/NonCompliant/Inconclusive>" }.
If no font information is found, set brand_fonts_compliant to false and status to 'Inconclusive'.
If no color references are found, set color_format to 'None' and status to 'Inconclusive'.
Respond ONLY with the JSON output.
